category_sources: Official libsoundio homepage describes it as cross-platform audio input and output for real-time and consumer software.

display_name_sources: Official homepage and source repository use the name libsoundio.
docs_sources: Homepage is the official project surface and documentation fallback.
Official libsoundio homepage links to dedicated documentation.
